title: Quick Builder Pack
description: The Quick Builder Pack helps you create Minecraft maps faster while maintaining the vanilla experience, with tools and mods for all skill levels
body:
## Intro : This modpack was created to meet a personal need: a clean, fast, and optimized Minecraft environment. Specifically designed for a seamless gameplay experience, it does not add any blocks or items that could disrupt existing worlds or corrupt created structures. The goal was to maintain a pack that integrates perfectly with Vanilla gameplay while offering useful features to improve performance, entity management, and visual comfort. ### What Sets It Apart? All the mods included in this collection are centered around enhancing the Vanilla experience without altering the core of the game. The idea was to create a modular, stable, and fast environment by focusing on elements that truly add something valuable to the game, such as entity management, texture improvements, and performance optimizations. Each mod in this pack was chosen specifically for its ability to enrich the gameplay experience without radically changing Minecraft’s structure. There are subtle yet powerful improvements: better memory management, visual optimizations, and additions that make building and exploring more enjoyable. The goal is to provide a smooth and optimized experience for players, with mods like Sodium for performance, Clumps for XP management, or Better Villages to bring more life to villages, all while preserving Minecraft’s essence. This modpack was designed for those who want an efficient gaming experience, where performance meets simplicity, and every mod has a place. This is, in my opinion, what Minecraft Java Edition should be by default. ## Partners : This project is proudly supported by BisectHosting. Check out their services to easily host your projects with quality and reliability.

## Call to Action : Have questions? Need help? Join us on Discord or visit our GitHub to get involved with the community and contribute!
